name: Bananas Foster Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss banana slices with lemon juice; drain off excess.
2. Set aside 6 banana slices for garnish; divide remaining slices evenly among six lightly buttered 6-ounce custard cups.
3. Set cups in a shallow baking pan.
4. Beat eggs, milk, granulated sugar, and rum extract until well blended; pour evenly into custard cups.
5. Place the pan in a preheated 350°F oven; pour very hot water into the pan to within 1/2 inch of the top of the cups.
6. Bake about 40 to 50 minutes, until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Remove cups immediately from the hot water; cool on a wire rack for 5 to 10 minutes.
8. To serve, gently loosen custards with a thin spatula; invert onto serving plates and garnish with reserved banana slices.
9. Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat; blend in brown sugar, water, and cinnamon.
10. Bring to a boil; boil for 3 minutes.
11. Spoon about 1 tablespoon hot syrup over each custard and serve immediately.
